reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Conditional radio

Do you require visa sponsorship?

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Reference DOM (Collapsible section animation): Additional questions in collapsible section toggled by aria-expanded button Reference DOM (Form inside dialog): Application fields live inside a native dialog element Reference DOM (Conditional radio reveal): Selecting Yes on sponsorship reveals follow-up textarea Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: readonly-prefill, iframe-apply, details-accordion, decoy-form, table-layout. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: sidebar + main split apply layout. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Collapsible section animation; Form inside dialog; Conditional radio reveal.
